footer.tagline: Team coordination, simplified for sports clubs.
footer.tagline2: Built for clubs, coaches, parents and players.

home.badge: The platform for amateur sports clubs
home.title: Your club's energy, finally coordinated.
home.subtitle: No more lost WhatsApp call-ups. Real club coordination: attendance, reminders, communication — all in one app. And if some prefer to stay on WhatsApp, the option is one click away.
home.featuresBody: Call-ups, attendance, reminders and stats — everything is handled inside Clubero. WhatsApp stays available as an option for anyone who doesn't want to leave the group.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your club's coordination?
home.ctaBody: Join clubs that replace chaos with clarity.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade with ease.
pricing.subtitle: 30-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.trialBody: Full access to all platform features for 30 days. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
pricing.enterpriseBody: Custom pricing based on your needs.
pricing.footer: All plans include European hosting, GDPR compliance and email support.

home.subtitle: Groups, brackets, schedule, fields, live standings and online registration — everything included. Share a public link or a TV screen to follow scores live in the venue.
home.feat1Body: Draws, multi-field schedule and qualifications computed for you.
home.feat2Body: Scores update in real time. Spectators and teams follow from their phone.
home.feat3Body: Public registration page, organizer approval, team cap and player rosters.
home.feat4Body: Dedicated link for big screens — current matches, upcoming matches and rolling standings.

pricing.title: Tournaments
pricing.subtitle: For organizers outside a Clubero club.
pricing.info: Pay per event. No subscription, access to the Clubero Tournaments module for one tournament.

start.metaDesc: Create your Clubero account and launch your tournament in minutes. Pay per event, no subscription.
start.heading: Start a tournament
start.subheading: Log in or create your account in seconds. No subscription required — pay per event.
start.passwordError: Password must be 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase and a digit.
start.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
